features.name: DESIGN.md Governor
features.summary: Adds opt-in Google Labs Code DESIGN.md support for design tokens, design rationale, linting, summaries, and diff checks.
features.user_value: UI/style work can use a structured design-system source of truth without copying plugin-global assets into projects.

features.name: Bundled DESIGN.md fallback linter
features.summary: Provides deterministic Python checks for token references, colors, contrast, section order, duplicate sections, typography, and component properties.
features.user_value: Projects can validate DESIGN.md even when the official npm CLI is unavailable.
